segments.text: Then Zophar the Naamathite replied:
Are all these words to go unanswered? Is this talker to be vindicated?
segments.speaker: Zophar

segments.text: Will your idle talk reduce others to silence? Will no one rebuke you when you mock?
segments.speaker: Zophar

segments.text: You say to God, 'My beliefs are flawless and I am pure in your sight.'
segments.speaker: Zophar

segments.text: Oh, how I wish that God would speak, that he would open his lips against you
segments.speaker: Zophar

segments.text: and disclose to you the secrets of wisdom, for true wisdom has two sides. Know this: God has even forgotten some of your sin.
segments.speaker: Zophar

segments.text: Can you fathom the mysteries of God? Can you probe the limits of the Almighty?
segments.speaker: Zophar

segments.text: They are higher than the heavens above—what can you do? They are deeper than the depths below—what can you know?
segments.speaker: Zophar

segments.text: Their measure is longer than the earth and wider than the sea.
segments.speaker: Zophar

segments.text: If he comes along and confines you in prison and convenes a court, who can oppose him?
segments.speaker: Zophar

segments.text: Surely he recognizes deceivers; and when he sees evil, does he not take note?
segments.speaker: Zophar

segments.text: But the witless can no more become wise than a wild donkey's colt can be born human.
segments.speaker: Zophar

segments.text: Yet if you devote your heart to him and stretch out your hands to him,
segments.speaker: Zophar

segments.text: if you put away the sin that is in your hand and allow no evil to dwell in your tent,
segments.speaker: Zophar

segments.text: then, free of fault, you will lift up your face; you will stand firm and without fear.
segments.speaker: Zophar

segments.text: You will surely forget your trouble, recalling it only as waters gone by.
segments.speaker: Zophar

segments.text: Life will be brighter than noonday, and darkness will become like morning.
segments.speaker: Zophar

segments.text: You will be secure, because there is hope; you will look about you and take your rest in safety.
segments.speaker: Zophar

segments.text: You will lie down, with no one to make you afraid, and many will court your favor.
segments.speaker: Zophar

segments.text: But the eyes of the wicked will fail, and escape will elude them; their hope will become a dying gasp.
segments.speaker: Zophar
